word: G3947 - παροξύνω - paroxýnō - par-ox-oo'-no - Easily provoke

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to stimulate, spur on, urge, to make sharp, to sharpen
2. to irritate, provoke, rouse to anger
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G3844 and a derivative of G3691; to sharpen alongside, that is, (figuratively) to exasperate: - easily provoke, stir.
